youtube_title: Uruguay 1-1 Saudi Arabia: Favorites STUNNED as Group H Blows Wide Open | World Cup 2026
youtube_description:
Uruguay's star-studded squad was held to a 1-1 draw by Saudi Arabia in their World Cup 2026 Group H opener. Abdulelah Alamri struck before half-time before Maxi Araujo rescued a point on 80 minutes — and with Spain only drawing Cape Verde, all four teams are level on a point. Daily World Cup stories, copyright-safe. Subscribe for the road through 2026.

#WorldCup2026 #Uruguay #SaudiArabia
